message:
fix(security): harden SDK verifier capsule with SHA-256, length-prefixed hashing, and ct_eq (bd-nbwo)

Replace three security bugs in sdk/verifier/capsule.rs:
- XOR-based hash -> SHA-256 with domain separator
- Pipe-delimited signing payload -> length-prefixed encoding
- Non-constant-time comparison -> ct_eq via subtle::ConstantTimeEq

Promote sdk/verifier/ to proper Cargo crate (frankenengine-verifier-sdk)
with sha2, hex, and subtle dependencies. Add 6 adversarial regression tests
covering collision resistance, delimiter collision, payload-input confusion,
forged same-length signatures, payload swap, and cross-claim replay.

Also fix pipe-delimited chain_binding in sdk/verifier_sdk.rs (line 635)
to use deterministic_hash_fields() with length-prefixed encoding.

37 SDK crate tests pass, clippy clean, checker 70/70 PASS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -85,12 +86,28 @@ Public-facing: ERR_CAPSULE_SIGNATURE_INVALID, ERR_CAPSULE_SCHEMA_MISMATCH,
 ERR_CAPSULE_REPLAY_DIVERGED, ERR_CAPSULE_VERDICT_MISMATCH,
 ERR_SDK_VERSION_UNSUPPORTED, ERR_CAPSULE_ACCESS_DENIED.
 
+## Security Hardening (CrimsonCrane, 2026-03-10)
+
+The SDK facade crate was hardened to eliminate three security bugs:
+
+| Bug | Before | After |
+|-----|--------|-------|
+| Weak hash | XOR-based (collisions trivial) | SHA-256 with domain separator |
+| Delimiter collision | Pipe-delimited field concatenation | Length-prefixed encoding |
+| Timing attack | `!=` string comparison | `ct_eq` via `subtle::ConstantTimeEq` |
+
+The SDK facade is now a proper Cargo crate (`frankenengine-verifier-sdk`) added to the
+workspace, with `sha2`, `hex`, and `subtle` dependencies. 6 adversarial regression tests
+cover: XOR collision resistance, delimiter collision, payload-input confusion, forged
+same-length signatures, payload swap under reused signature, and cross-claim replay.
+
 ## Verification
 
 - Check script: `scripts/check_verifier_sdk_capsule.py` -- 70/70 checks PASS
 - Self-test: 15/15 checks PASS
 - Unit tests: `tests/test_check_verifier_sdk_capsule.py` -- 13/13 tests PASS
-- Rust unit tests: 52 inline tests in implementation, 30 in SDK facade
+- Rust unit tests: 54 inline tests in implementation, 37 in SDK facade crate
+- Clippy: 0 warnings with `-D warnings`
 - All types are Send + Sync, serde-serializable, BTreeMap for determinism
 
 ## Relationship to Existing Code

@@ -144,5 +144,5 @@ Multi-step verification workflows are modeled as `VerificationSession`:
 ## Implementation
 
 - Module: `crates/franken-node/src/connector/universal_verifier_sdk.rs`
-- SDK facade: `sdk/verifier/mod.rs` and `sdk/verifier/capsule.rs`
+- SDK crate: `sdk/verifier/` (`frankenengine-verifier-sdk`)
 - Conformance test: `tests/conformance/verifier_sdk_capsule_replay.rs`

         "Wired into connector/mod.rs",

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+[package]
+name = "frankenengine-verifier-sdk"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+description = "Universal verifier SDK for replaying signed capsules and reproducing claim verdicts"
+license = "MIT"
+
+[dependencies]
+sha2 = "0.10.8"
+hex = "0.4.3"
+subtle = "2.6.1"
+
+[dev-dependencies]
